inputs.name: diff_context
inputs.text:
Generate a git commit message for the staged changes below.

Rules:
- Follow the existing commit style shown in the recent log
- Use conventional commits format: `type(scope): description`
  Types: feat, fix, docs, refactor, test, chore, perf, ci
  Scope: crate name, module, or area (e.g. minibox, miniboxd, xtask)
- First line: <=72 chars, imperative mood, no period
- If the change warrants it, populate body with 2-4 lines of context
- Do NOT add Co-Authored-By lines
- Return only subject and body fields — no markdown fences, no extra text

subject.description: Conventional commit subject line, <=72 chars, imperative mood, no trailing period.

body.description: Optional commit body with 2-4 lines of context. Empty string if not needed.
